questionHtml: Suggest one way in which multiple sclerosis has affected the cerebral hemispheres of the brain.
markschemeHtml:
less white matter
OR
bigger space in the middle/ventricles
OR
overall area/volume of cortex/cerebrum is reduced/space between cortex/cerebrum and cranium bigger/number of folds is reduced
OR
slower nerve transmission
OR
fewer synapses
OR
function of cerebral hemispheres diminished ✔

meta.title: Suggest one way in which multiple sclerosis has affected the cerebral hemispheres of the brain.
